UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO ITS ATTORNEY'S FEES TO BE DETERMINED BY A SEPARATE MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed.
Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant is entitled to its attorney's fees to be determined by a separate motion. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported.
